title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 429.611 - Lien claim release or satisfaction to be filed when
text:
429.611.  Lien claim release or satisfaction to be filed when. — If a claim for a lien has been filed with the county recorder of deeds and a condition occurs that would preclude the broker from receiving compensation under the terms of the real estate broker's written agreement, the real estate broker shall record and provide the owner of record a written release or satisfaction of the lien.
(L. 1993 S.B. 18 § 5)
